allow: PowerShell($node = \(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($node\) { "node: $\($node.Source\) $\(node --version\)" } else { "node: NOT FOUND" }; $npm = \(Get-Command npm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($npm\) { "npm: $\(npm --version\)" } else { "npm: NOT FOUND" }; $py = \(Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($py\) { "python: $\(python --version\)" } else { "python: NOT FOUND" })
